## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12.4]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 20.18.0]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 130]
- TinyFlow version/commit: [e.g., 0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (logs, configuration, etc.).
